title: moonstone
description:
This module adds many accessories，
It requires Curios API Continuation or Curios API
body:
# English

summary:

This Mod provides unprecedented power and novelty experience for your adventure. Here, there is Morris, who excels in dog fighting and has strong auxiliary abilities, ancient technology that embodies the wisdom of ancient people, and viruses with strong aggression but obvious weaknesses, all of which together expand the fun of exploration in the Minecraft world.


### Nightmare's Eye Abyss:

### ![nightmare eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9479db721a72e37f829967669495e816c415bd81.png)深渊：
![night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ce51fb4201c245f0f21d3ffe0317a16718f8b32_0.webp)


The Abyss series showcases its mysterious power in accessories, suitable for "TikTok" players. It will increase the damage you receive, but at the same time, you also have the opportunity to obtain more powerful accessories to compensate for your weakened abilities.


### Nanotechnology/Martial Arts:### 

### ![nano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeadc11eefde6f33741bb4922dc58b0753b2a796.png)科技/武学：
﻿
![kongfu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df746164a3d0c0545b070bf2f660b04ada2fc31_0.webp)

 

And ancient technological accessories contain wisdom and power from the distant past, and their design inspiration comes from forgotten technology in ancient cities. These accessories can bring various auxiliary or offensive effects to players, such as summoning sword formations or sonic boom attacks, or making guardians no longer hostile.

### Necora Plague:

### ![necora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6aa539395bec8d1b18e454e8f363496325bf3a.png)瘟疫：
![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b37f43b1d308d0e77b3bb9da7a794ccc6878c9.png)
﻿

As for virus accessories, this mod incorporates several famous viruses from a certain game, among which Necrora virus and Vampire virus are the most unique. The former allows players to transform other creatures into their own zombie army, while the latter allows players to summon bats during attacks. You can even make your virus more aggressive by changing your genetic module. To obtain these virus accessories, you need to complete a series of challenges set by the author in the book. It is worth mentioning that almost all the ways to obtain accessories in this mod are introduced in the book.


### Spirit：

This module introduces a new core resource - Spirit. When you defeat undead creatures or unlock treasure chests in various dungeons, you have a chance to obtain spiritual qualities. Lingzhi is a key material for making various powerful jewelry. The other part of the accessories that cannot be made require players to complete designated challenge tasks or search for them in the dungeon treasure chest after meeting the conditions.

At the same time, the new progress will record your growth process in this Mod. Most items have Shift prompts and unique item panels to highlight the category of the item. 


### Common questions:

A： I collapsed

B: You can send it to the official website, and the author will handle it as soon as possible!

A： Why do some items lack synthetic formulas/are they inaccessible?

B： These formulas can be viewed in the Jei module.

A： Will you port to an old version?

B:  Not currently, unless it's a special circumstance.

### What do you think this mod is too bulky? Try using the following independent mods!
[NightmareBase](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortals-nightmare)

[NecoraVirus](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortal-virus)


-----------

# 中文


**概述：**

 
本Mod为你的冒险提供了前所未有的强大助力与新奇体验。这里有拼狗运而且辅助能力极强的莫里斯，凝聚古人智慧的远古科技，还有攻击性强却有明显弱点的病毒，共同拓展了Minecraft世界中的探险乐趣。
﻿
### ![nightmare eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9479db721a72e37f829967669495e816c415bd81.png)深渊：
![night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ce51fb4201c245f0f21d3ffe0317a16718f8b32_0.webp)

 
深渊系列在饰品中尽显神秘力量，适合“抖m”类玩家，会让你受到的伤害增加，但同时你也有机会获得更加强大的饰品来补足你被削弱的能力。
﻿
### ![nano](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeadc11eefde6f33741bb4922dc58b0753b2a796.png)科技/武学：
﻿
![kongfu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df746164a3d0c0545b070bf2f660b04ada2fc31_0.webp)

 
而远古科技类饰品，蕴含着来自遥远过去的智慧与力量，它们的设计灵感源自远古城市中被遗忘的科技。这些饰品能为玩家带来各种各样的辅助性或攻击性效果，比如召唤剑阵或音爆攻击，或是让监守者不再敌对。
﻿
﻿
### ![necora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6aa539395bec8d1b18e454e8f363496325bf3a.png)瘟疫：
![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b37f43b1d308d0e77b3bb9da7a794ccc6878c9.png)
﻿

 
至于病毒饰品，本mod加入了若干某游戏中的著名病毒，其中necora病毒与吸血鬼病毒最为独特，前者能让玩家将其他生物转化为属于自己丧尸军团，后者则能让玩家在攻击时召唤蝙蝠。你甚至可以通过改变自己的基因模块，使你体内病毒更具有攻击性。想要获取这些病毒饰品，你需要完成作者在书中设下的一系列挑战，值得一提的是本mod几乎全部饰品的获取方式在书中都有介绍。
﻿
### 灵质![star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/802d2d4f0fa505a21cda5fe5133924006f237b6a.png)
﻿
本模组引入了全新的核心资源 —— 灵质。当你击败亡灵生物或者开启各种地牢的宝箱时，就有机会获得灵质。灵质是制作各种强大饰品的关键材料。另一部分不能制作的饰品则需要玩家完成指定挑战任务或是满足条件后在地牢宝箱中寻找。

 
同时新的进度会记录你在本 Mod 中的成长历程，大多数物品都有 Shift 提示和独特的物品面板，以便突出显示物品所在类别

 
**常见问题：**


A:*崩溃了*  

B:可以发到官方网站，作者会第一时间处理！

﻿
A:*为什么有些物品没有合成配方/它们是无法获取吗？*  

﻿
B:这些配方在Jei模组查看。

﻿
A:*你会移植到旧的版本吗？*


 
B: 暂时不会，除非是特殊情况。


 A:*这个模组内的实体消失了*


 
B: 请关闭光影。


### 什么觉得这个模组过于臃肿？尝试使用下列的独立Mod吧！
[NightmareBase](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortals-nightmare)

[NecoraVirus](https://modrinth.com/mod/seeking-immortal-virus)
